name: Haggerty
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the potatoes into very thin slices and pat them dry with a towel.
2. Slice the onion extremely thin.
3. Heat half of the bacon fat in a heavy frying pan.
4. Layer the potato slices, onion slices, and cheese alternately in the pan, finishing with potato slices.
5. Sprinkle each layer with salt and pepper.
6. Dot the top layer of potatoes with the remaining bacon fat.
7. Cook over moderate heat until the potatoes are almost tender.
8. Carefully turn the potatoes onto a platter, flipping them so the top side is down, then return them to the pan.
9. Continue cooking until the potatoes are fully done.
10. To serve, cut into wedges.
